recommendations.title: LOL Surprise: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Dazzling doll sisters Queen Bee and Royal Bee make their first movie with help from their fashionable friends in this one-of-a-kind magical adventure.

recommendations.title: My Neighbor Totoro

recommendations.title: The Triplets of Belleville
recommendations.overview: When her grandson is kidnapped during the Tour de France, Madame Souza and her beloved pooch Bruno team up with the Belleville Sisters—an aged song-and-dance team from the days of Fred Astaire—to rescue him.

recommendations.title: Barbie & Her Sisters in the Great Puppy Adventure
recommendations.overview: Barbie and her sisters, Skipper, Stacie and Chelsea, and their adorable new puppy friends find unexpected mystery and adventure when they return to their hometown of Willows. While going through mementos in Grandma's attic, the sisters discover an ol

recommendations.title: Curious George: Royal Monkey
recommendations.overview: Join your favorite monkey as he takes on his most regal role yet in the all-new movie, Curious George: Royal Monkey. After disrupting a meeting with a stuffy royal family, George accidentally trades places with the king's snooty monkey, Philippe. Whi

recommendations.title: Barbie: A Perfect Christmas
recommendations.overview: The vacation plans of Barbie and her sisters take a turn due to a snowstorm. Stranded in Tannenbaum town, they find themselves amidst a holiday venture where they learn a heartwarming lesson.

recommendations.title: Deidra & Laney Rob a Train
recommendations.overview: After their mother ends up in jail, two sisters turn to train robbery in order to support their family.

recommendations.title: The Cave of the Golden Rose 3

recommendations.title: Spycies
recommendations.overview: Vladimir and Hector, two secret agents opposed in every way, are trying to recover a top secret material stolen by unknown intruders.

recommendations.title: The King and the Mockingbird
recommendations.overview: A young shepherdess and a chimneysweep plan to get married and escape the clutches of a tyrannical king in love with her, assisted by the guile of a cheeky mockingbird, the king's archenemy.
